item.title: C8 Corvette Ride Along in Kentucky
item.description: A quick Corvette C8 clip from Kentucky with a reply to a viewer comment. It highlights the car and the moment without extra commentary. What stands out most about the C8?

media:content.media:title: C8 Corvette Ride Along in Kentucky
media:content.media:description: A quick Corvette C8 clip from Kentucky with a reply to a viewer comment. It highlights the car and the moment without extra commentary. What stands out most about the C8?

item.title: Reply to a viewer about a Ford Mustang
item.description: A reply to a viewer about a Ford Mustang and why it would not be sold to just anyone. What makes this one worth keeping?

media:content.media:title: Reply to a viewer about a Ford Mustang
media:content.media:description: A reply to a viewer about a Ford Mustang and why it would not be sold to just anyone. What makes this one worth keeping?

item.title: It's Not the Dealer, It's You
item.description: A discussion about common mistakes and misunderstandings that can affect the car buying process from the customer side. The video focuses on preparation, expectations, and financial decisions during a purchase. What do you think is the biggest mistake buyers make at dealerships?

media:content.media:title: It's Not the Dealer, It's You
media:content.media:description: A discussion about common mistakes and misunderstandings that can affect the car buying process from the customer side. The video focuses on preparation, expectations, and financial decisions during a purchase. What do you think is the biggest mistake buyers make at dealerships?

item.title: Credit Karma vs FICO: What’s the Difference?
item.description: A breakdown of the differences between Credit Karma scores and FICO credit scores, including how each is calculated and used by lenders. The video helps viewers better understand credit reporting and financing expectations. Which credit score do you usually pay attention to most?

media:content.media:title: Credit Karma vs FICO: What’s the Difference?
media:content.media:description: A breakdown of the differences between Credit Karma scores and FICO credit scores, including how each is calculated and used by lenders. The video helps viewers better understand credit reporting and financing expectations. Which credit score do you usually pay attention to most?

item.title: Will I Ever Sell This Vehicle?
item.description: A straightforward look at whether this vehicle is worth keeping or selling, with practical car ownership considerations in mind. What factors would make you keep it or move on?

media:content.media:title: Will I Ever Sell This Vehicle?
media:content.media:description: A straightforward look at whether this vehicle is worth keeping or selling, with practical car ownership considerations in mind. What factors would make you keep it or move on?

item.title: 5 Car Buying Mistakes That Can Cost You Thousands
item.description: Five common car buying mistakes can add up fast. Learn what to watch for when comparing prices, features, and dealership offers so you can make a smarter purchase. What should buyers check first?

media:content.media:title: 5 Car Buying Mistakes That Can Cost You Thousands
media:content.media:description: Five common car buying mistakes can add up fast. Learn what to watch for when comparing prices, features, and dealership offers so you can make a smarter purchase. What should buyers check first?

item.title: Super Low Miles on This Truck
item.description: A look at a super low-mileage truck and what that can mean for condition, value, and ownership. What stands out most when a truck has very low miles?

item.title: Used Car Market Trends and Pricing Update
item.description: A look at the latest used car market movement, with pricing and dealership insights for buyers and owners. What is driving the market right now?
